description: Smash the Boss Terror Reign in Lawrence Demand the Release of Berkman and Murdoch WORKERS OF THE WORLD UNITE Vol VIII No 255 HOOVER AND LAVAL ARE PREPARING NEW WORLD WAR AGAINST THE SOM UNION FOR THE DIVISION OF CHINA Hunger March in Missouri and Reading Pa Preparations On Full Blast for State Hunger Parade Preliminary to Dec 7th Drive Jobless to Put De a nands to Socialist City Administra tion Legion Threats National March Final preparations for the Missouri State Hunger March are going ahead full blast The march gets under way for Jefferson City on Saturday October 24th at 10 a m Friday night a special meeting of all hun ger marchers and all truck drivers is being held A total of 25000 leaflets are being distributed at the factory gates employment agencies flop houses and in the neighborhoods calling on the workers to two huge rallies for the sendoff of the marchers The first rally is to take place A Upholsterers Continue State Parlor Strike The strike of the upholsterers of the State Parlor Suite Co against a lockout still continues unabated at 411 Bedford Ave Brooklyn The strike was called when the boss refused to live
